# getCookie | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ HIDDriverKit ](/documentation/hiddriverkit)

-  getCookie 

Instance Method# getCookie

DriverKit 19.0+macOS

```
IOHIDElementCookie getCookie();
```

## [Return Value](/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getCookie#return-value)

Returns the element cookie. The cookie is a unique identifier of the element.

## [See Also](/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getCookie#see-also)

### [Identifying the Element](/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getCookie#Identifying-the-Element)

[`IOHIDElementCookie`](/documentation/hiddriverkit/iohidelementcookie)A type that an element uses to distinguish itself from other elements.
